title: Pakistan launches manhunt for four PoK protesters after crackdown killing 19 kids, 7 pregnant women
summary_full: Pakistan-occupied Kashmir (PoK) administration launched a manhunt for protesters and offered a bounty for JAAC leaders after deadly clashes. An intelligence dossier details systematic violence by Pakistani forces, including targeting the JAAC and using live ammunition, resulting in numerous civilian deaths. India condemned the excessive force and urged international accountability for Pakistan's actions.
